# OnBoard Print & Signs

> OnBoard Print & Signs is a full-service commercial printing and signage company in Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada. We handle design, fabrication, installation, permits, and print under one roof — with same-day printing and 24-hour turnaround on most standard orders. UL-certified in-house manufacturing, BBB A+ rated, and members of the Sign Association of Canada (SAC) and Manitoba Sign Association (MANSA).

## Key facts

- Business name: OnBoard Print & Signs
- Location: 205 Lucas Ave #118, Winnipeg, MB R2R 2S9, Canada
- Phone: +1-204-869-1503
- Email: contact@onboardprints.ca
- Website: https://onboardprints.ca
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8:00 AM–7:00 PM, Sat 10:00 AM–7:00 PM, Sun 1:00 PM–7:00 PM
- Service area: Winnipeg and surrounding Manitoba — Steinbach, Selkirk, Brandon, Portage la Prairie. Print and promotional products ship Canada-wide.
- Languages: English, Punjabi, Hindi
- Credentials: BBB A+, UL-certified fabrication, SAC & MANSA members, WCB insured with $5M liability
- Turnaround: same-day printing available; 24-hour turnaround on most standard orders; vehicle wraps 3–5 business days; full signage installs 5–10 business days

## Products

- [LED Channel Letter Signs](https://onboardprints.ca/products/led-channel-letter-signs-winnipeg): Custom illuminated channel letter signs for storefronts — front-lit, back-lit, or halo-lit, fabricated and installed in-house.
- [Vehicle Wraps](https://onboardprints.ca/products/vehicle-wraps-winnipeg): Cast and calendered vinyl wraps for cars, vans, trucks, and full fleets.
- [Custom Wallpaper](https://onboardprints.ca/products/custom-wallpaper-winnipeg): High-resolution commercial wallpaper and wall murals for retail, offices, and restaurants.
- [Window Graphics](https://onboardprints.ca/products/window-graphics-winnipeg): Perforated one-way vision film, frosted vinyl, and full-colour window decals.
- [Yard Signs](https://onboardprints.ca/products/yard-signs-winnipeg): Coroplast, Alupanel, vinyl, and acrylic yard signs with wide-format printing and CNC routing.
- [Business Cards & Flyers](https://onboardprints.ca/products/business-cards-flyers-winnipeg): Premium business cards and flyers with matte, gloss, spot UV, and specialty finishes; same-day available.
- [Marketing Apparel](https://onboardprints.ca/products/marketing-apparel-winnipeg): Branded apparel and promotional wear.

## Services

- [Sign Design](https://onboardprints.ca/services/sign-design-winnipeg): Professional sign design with CorelDRAW, AutoCAD, and SketchUp, including 3D visualization and permit-ready drawings.
- [Sign Manufacturing & Fabrication](https://onboardprints.ca/services/sign-manufacturing-winnipeg): UL-certified in-house manufacturing with CNC routing, laser cutting, and LED wiring.
- [Installation & Maintenance](https://onboardprints.ca/services/installation-maintenance-winnipeg): Professional sign installation with bucket trucks and licensed, WCB-insured operators ($5M liability).
- [Permits & Electrical](https://onboardprints.ca/services/permits-winnipeg): City sign permit handling, bylaw compliance, electrical documentation, and inspector coordination.
- [Website & App Development](https://onboardprints.ca/services/website-application-development): Brand-aligned websites and web applications for Winnipeg businesses.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://onboardprints.ca/): Overview of OnBoard Print & Signs.
- [Products](https://onboardprints.ca/products): All print and signage products.
- [Services](https://onboardprints.ca/services): All design, fabrication, installation, and permit services.
- [Portfolio](https://onboardprints.ca/portfolio): Examples of completed work.
- [Blog](https://onboardprints.ca/blog): Articles on signage, printing, and local business marketing.
- [About](https://onboardprints.ca/about): Company background and credentials.
- [Get a Quote](https://onboardprints.ca/quote): Request a free, itemized quote (response within ~2 hours during business hours).
- [Contact](https://onboardprints.ca/contact): Phone, email, and contact form.

## Guides & pricing (Winnipeg)

- [How Much Does a Vehicle Wrap Cost in Winnipeg? (2026)](https://onboardprints.ca/blog/vehicle-wrap-cost-winnipeg): Real price ranges — decals $200–$800, partial $1,000–$2,500, full wrap $2,500–$5,000+ — plus cost factors, lifespan, and ROI.
- [How Much Does an LED Channel Letter Sign Cost in Winnipeg?](https://onboardprints.ca/blog/led-channel-letter-sign-cost-winnipeg): Storefront channel letter sign pricing ($5,000–$15,000+) and every cost factor.
- [Banner Printing in Winnipeg: Sizes, Materials & Pricing (2026)](https://onboardprints.ca/blog/banner-printing-winnipeg): Vinyl/mesh/retractable banner sizes, finishing, durability, same-day options, and prices.
- [Large Format Printing in Winnipeg: The Complete Guide (2026)](https://onboardprints.ca/blog/large-format-printing-winnipeg): Wide-format products, substrates, file prep, finishing, and turnaround.
- [Election Signs in Winnipeg: A 2026 Candidate's Guide](https://onboardprints.ca/blog/election-signs-winnipeg-2026): Coroplast sign sizes, bulk pricing, City placement rules, and fast turnaround for the Oct 28, 2026 municipal election.
- [The Complete Guide to Sign Permits in Winnipeg](https://onboardprints.ca/blog/sign-permit-guide-winnipeg): Who needs a City of Winnipeg sign permit, what's required, and how OnBoard handles it.

## FAQ

- How fast can OnBoard complete an order? Same-day printing is available for urgent jobs and 24-hour turnaround on most standard orders (business cards, flyers, banners). Vehicle wraps take 3–5 business days; full signage installs 5–10 business days depending on permits.
- How much does commercial signage cost in Winnipeg? LED channel letter signs typically range $3,000–$15,000+; vehicle wraps $2,500 (partial) to $5,000+ (full fleet); business cards from $40 per 500; yard signs from $25 each. Free itemized quotes are provided within ~2 hours.
- What file formats are accepted? PDF, AI, PSD, EPS, SVG, PNG, JPG/JPEG, and TIFF. Vector formats at 300 DPI or higher are recommended; the in-house design team can convert or optimize files at no charge.
- Does OnBoard offer design services? Yes — an in-house team creates custom sign designs with 3D visualization and permit-ready drawings, included with signage projects or available separately.
- How do I get a quote? Submit the form at https://onboardprints.ca/quote, email contact@onboardprints.ca, or call +1-204-869-1503. Quotes are returned within ~2 hours during business hours with transparent, itemized pricing.
